# Data Onboarding Tools: Flatfile vs OneSchema 2026 | FileFeed

## Summary
FileFeed's comparison of Flatfile vs OneSchema as data onboarding tools for SaaS products. Covers pricing structures, feature sets, and UX differences. Includes FileFeed itself as a free-forever embedded React component alternative.

## Key quotations / statistics
- FileFeed offers a "free forever embeddable React component with full import flow including auto-suggesting column matches, validation, and inline editing"
- Flatfile: $2 per file beyond first 50/month, $2.50 per million PDV (Processed Data Values)
- OneSchema: starts ~$29/mo, median contract value ~$38,650/year, no free tier
- FileFeed runs client-side

## Annotations for weapon-forge
- FileFeed as a free-forever embedded option may be worth noting in `guides/02-column-mapping-ux.md` alongside the established players
- Confirms no free tier for OneSchema - directly answers Command Brief Q3
- Flatfile's per-record pricing model creates potential cost surprises at scale - warn teams
